description_long: This is a small, rectangular wooden cabin with a simple, functional design. The exterior walls are clad in horizontal wooden planks, giving it a rustic appearance, while the roof is a dark, single-pitch gable style with a slight overhang. The front facade features a central door flanked by two small windows, both of which are square and symmetrically placed. The rear side appears to have a small, rectangular window or vent, while the sides are solid wood with no visible openings. The cabin sits low to the ground, suggesting a compact, single-story structure suitable for residential or recreational use. The overall look is utilitarian, with minimal ornamentation and a focus on practicality.
description: A compact, rectangular wooden cabin with a dark gable roof, central front door, and small symmetrical windows, exuding a rustic and functional style.
description_view_0: Front view shows a central door with two small square windows on either side, beneath a dark gable roof.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the solid wooden wall and the full length of the dark, overhanging gable roof.
description_view_2: Rear view displays a plain wooden wall with a small rectangular window or vent near the base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, shows a solid wooden wall and the roof's overhang.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with moderate overhang, clad in dark material
attribute_window_arrangement: Two small square windows symmetrically placed on the front facade, one small rectangular window or vent on the rear; no windows on the sides
attribute_door_placement: Single door centered on the front facade between two windows
